posts.author: jsgamba (Jeffry Gamba)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am administering a monday.com instance with large number of users. The problem is that when someone send us a app installation request we don’t get much notification - I am getting only a notification in the web app.

Is there a way to automate the user app installation request will convert into an item so we can track them in the board and we can get Slack integrated to it.

Any tips?
